  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"删除设备点位"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/points/delete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



按 deviceId、endpointId 与 functionCode 删除设备 object

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","minimum":0,"description":"端点 ID。"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码。"}},"title":"DeleteDevicePointRequest"},"examples":{"deleteDevicePoint":{"value":{"deviceId":"device-001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
